title: 🌸 Identity Bloom Fractals
name: Identity Bloom Fractals
what_it_is: Fractals that model identity as layered emergence—each iteration a self similar to but not identical with the last. The self blooms, spirals, mutates.
how_to_use: her face blossoms across dimensions—each a petal of her greater identity fractal
his emotions grow in fractal rings, repeating in new context every time
animation_behavior: Identity layers unfold one by one, emotions bloom outward, visuals pulse in self-similar growth ---
